title: DOM Dialog System Overhaul & UI Refinements
summary: Replaced all native browser alert/confirm/prompt calls with fully custom DOM dialogs featuring glass-morphic design, animated entry/exit, keyboard support, and a danger variant. Also adds GIF upload support for room and avatar photos, and a global modern scrollbar style.

items: New glass-morphic modal dialog system: uiAlert, uiConfirm, and uiPrompt rebuilt from scratch with animated entry (slideUp + fade) and exit (slideDown + fade) via .ui-closing class and animationend event.
Modal panels feature icon-wrap (teal for normal, red for danger), a close-X button, and a structured top-bar / body / footer layout.
Danger variant: uiConfirm now accepts { danger: true } which applies red glow border, red-tinted icon wrap, and a solid red gradient action button.
Confirm button uses a teal-to-purple gradient with a soft cyan box-shadow glow.
Cancel button rendered as a muted semi-transparent chip.
Global keyboard handling: Enter confirms/submits, Escape cancels/closes for all dialog types. Handler is stored on the overlay element and removed on close to prevent leaks.
_uiClose() helper plays exit animation before DOM removal, keeping resolve() callback tied to animation completion.
_uiPanelHtml() shared template helper generates all dialog HTML from a single options object.

GIF upload support for room photos: inline file input inside the room settings panel; GIF files bypass canvas compression to preserve animation; non-GIF images compressed to max 400px / 82% JPEG quality.
GIF upload support for avatars: _handlePhotoFile detects image/gif and reads raw data URL, skipping canvas; file size limit raised from 5 MB to 8 MB.
Room and avatar file inputs updated to accept="image/*,image/gif".

Global modern scrollbar: 5px thin teal (rgba 56 189 248) scrollbar applied to all scrollable containers via universal * selector with opt-out for html, body, composer textarea, .prf-tabs, and [data-hide-scroll].

Removed last two native confirm() calls: style-reset button (styleResetDefaultsBtn.onclick) now uses await uiConfirm() with danger:true; UPS block-user button converted to async arrow and uses await uiConfirm() with danger:true.
UPS block-user handler correctly calls closeUserProfileScreen() after block confirmation regardless of outcome.
Keyboard handler no longer leaks on repeated dialog open/close cycles.
Modal overlay uses backdrop-filter: blur(10px) saturate(1.3) and rgba(0,0,0,.7) background.
Panel background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(30,41,59,.98), rgba(15,23,42,.99)) with 22px border-radius and layered box-shadow (spread + inner glow).
New keyframes: uiMoOut (overlay fade-out) and uiMoSlideOut (panel slide-down + fade-out).
ui-modal-input redesigned: dark semi-transparent background, teal focus ring, smooth transition.
